patch.value: CONTEXT: extension-only installs cannot resolve @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk (no node_modules), so a runtime import would crash. DECISION: scaffold emits defineExtension only in package mode (peerDependencies make the import resolvable) and an import-free JSDoc @param ExtensionApi hint in extension-only mode. CONSEQUENCES: both modes get typed APIs and run without import errors; two idioms in docs can confuse authors; JSDoc gives weaker type safety. EVIDENCE: src/cli/commands/extension/scaffold.ts, src/sdk/index.ts defineExtension; item pm-wsui.
ADR: Two extension-authoring idioms: defineExtension (package mode) vs import-free JSDoc (extension-only)
Two extension-authoring idioms: defineExtension (package mode) vs import-free JSDoc (extension-only)
ADR recorded and accepted; architectural decision documented as durable context on 2026-05-31.
